title: Marketplace Manager - Zostel - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zostel - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Zostel invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
